runners.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 6th on March 21 over 515m at The Gardens behind Kenzie Robbo beaten 7 lengths (30.12) in a NG. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 6th on March 21 over 515m at The Gardens behind Kenzie Robbo beaten 7 lengths (30.12) in a NG. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked, raced wide rounding the 1st turn and shifted ground.
Came together shortly after the start and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.09) when fifth over 520m at Wentworth Park in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and three places from six starts. Can feature in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 9 lengths (30.37) behind Condo Bandit in a Grade 5 on April 11. With a good start will take catching.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 9 lengths (30.37) behind Condo Bandit in a Grade 5 on April 11. With a good start will take catching.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hind quarters contacted leaving the back straight and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 520m at Wentworth Park. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Finished second last time (25.19) over 450m at Maitland. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last time (25.19) over 450m at Maitland. Solid top-three prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Took an awkward stride in the turn to the home straight and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Last start finished third in a Grade 5 on April 7 over 515m at this track behind Great Chat, beaten 5 lengths (29.83). Hard to entertain this time.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wentworth Park (30.23) in a Grade 5, finishing a 9 length seventh. Has three wins and four placings from 10 starts from the draw. Will need some luck to feature.
